theme.name: Iron Fugue
theme.notes: D harmonic minor — raised 7th (C#) gives the authentic cadence pull essential to Baroque. Subject is a 4-beat cell with a rising leap on beat 3 — identifiable through all transforms. Electronic realization: Modular V3 or Juno for subject voice, Moog for continuo bass, Pigments pad underneath. No swing, no shuffle. Strict 16th grid throughout.
